rationale: The cited paper appears plausibly foundational to the citing paper’s self-control choice context: the citing note centers on exerting self-control when choosing goal-consistent vs. tempting alternatives, while the cited note studies trade-off conflict in choice and resulting executive depletion/vice choice.
